---
title: "Quarto Project B"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

altairを用いたプロット

```{python}
# import altair with an abbreviated alias
import altair as alt

# load a sample dataset as a pandas DataFrame
from altair.datasets import data

cars = data.cars()

# make the chart
alt.Chart(cars).mark_point().encode(
    x="Horsepower",
    y="Miles_per_Gallon",
    color="Origin",
).interactive()
```
